appraisal_events.evidence: « Ce simple croquis bouleversait Swann… »; il veut savoir à qui elle a cherché à plaire et se promet de l’interroger.
appraisal_events.explanation: A casual report of Odette seen in a distinctive outfit exposes to Swann that she has a life beyond him, provoking jealousy and insecurity.

status_effects.explanation: He is unsettled and jealous upon realizing Odette’s independent daytime life.
